title: Chat-Ping
description: Pings you if someone writes your name in to the Chat
body:
# Chat-Ping (v1.21)


**Chat-Ping** is a lightweight Minecraft mod that notifies you whenever your name is mentioned in the chat by displaying a customizable in-game toast notification. It's perfect for staying on top of conversations in multiplayer worlds or servers, ensuring you never miss an important message again!

## Features
- **Ping on Mention**: Receive a toast notification whenever your Minecraft username appears in the chat.

- **Lightweight & Seamless**: Works in the background without impacting gameplay performance.

## How It Works
As soon as your name is mentioned in the Minecraft chat, a toast notification will appear on the top-right corner of the screen. The notification includes the message:
- "You got Pinged by `<username>`"
For example, if another player types your name in the chat, you will see something like:
- `You got Pinged by BlackDev`


## Compatibility

- **Minecraft Version**: 1.21
- Works with **Fabric** mod loader.
- Compatible with multiplayer servers.

## Screenshots

![Ping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/846bb30d3ab56edc923f4c5e417da29d448886cd_0.webp)
_A notification is triggered when your name is mentioned in the chat._

## Planned Features

- **Customization**: Set different colors or styles for the ping notifications.
- **writing**: ignore upper and lower case writing also ignore if there are letters before the name.
- **Keyword Pings**: Allow pings on specific keywords beyond just your username.

## Feedback & Contributions
We appreciate feedback and contributions! Feel free to submit bugs or suggest features via the [Discord Server](https://dsc.gg/ChillandCode).


---

Enjoy seamless chat monitoring with **Chat-Ping**, and never miss another message directed at you again!
